# Haseloff Software Solutions

> Software, die verkauft. / Software that sells.

Haseloff Software Solutions is a German software development agency based in Burg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germany. Founded by Timo Haseloff, we build websites, web applications, mobile apps, and custom software systems for businesses across Germany, Austria, and Switzerland.

## What We Do

We specialize in three core service areas:

### Web Apps & Websites
Fast, scalable web applications that win and retain customers. From strategic landing pages to complex business platforms — built to convert. Technologies: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.

### Mobile Apps
Apps that users love. Native performance with React Native, thoughtful UX design, and seamless integration with existing systems.

### Custom Systems
Backend architectures, APIs, and automations that make teams faster. Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS — less manual work, more growth.

## How We Work

- **Results over ego.** Every decision serves one goal: measurably moving your business forward. No feature bloat, no over-engineering.
- **Built to last.** Code that works just as well in 3 years as on launch day. Thoughtful architecture, clean patterns, zero technical debt.
- **No ghosting.** After launch, we support, optimize, and scale. Good software evolves.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Mobile:** React Native
- **Backend:** Node.js, PostgreSQL
- **Infrastructure:** Docker, AWS, Vercel
- **Languages:** German, English

## Pricing

- Websites start at €2,500
- Apps and complex systems from €10,000
- Maintenance contracts from €150/month
- 3 months free support included with every project

## Process

1. Initial consultation (free, no strings attached)
2. Fixed-price proposal
3. Concept & Design
4. Development with weekly updates
5. Launch & ongoing support

## Contact

- **Website:** https://haseloff-software.de
- **Email:** kontakt@haseloff-solutions.de
- **Phone:** +49 1525 870 5975
- **Address:** Breite Straße 7, 39288 Burg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germany

## Key Facts

- 30+ delivered projects
- 5+ years of experience
- 100% client referral rate
- <24h response time
- Response within 24 hours, usually faster

## Selected Projects

- **Heimbach Logistics Portal** — Digital transformation for a mid-sized logistics company. Customer portal with shipment tracking, automated billing, and route optimization. (Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Stripe)
- **Stadtwerke Burg Customer App** — Mobile app for local utilities with meter readings, fault reporting, and consumption analysis. (React Native, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Firebase)
- **BBS Genthin School Website** — Complete website relaunch for a vocational school. Responsive design, timetable integration, online registrations. (Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi CMS, PostgreSQL)
- **Rechtsanwaltskanzlei Weber** — Digital client management for a law firm with appointment scheduling, document archive, and automated billing. GDPR-compliant. (Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL)
- **Elektro Müller Customer Platform** — Online platform for electrical contractor with cost estimates, appointment booking, and digital invoicing. (Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Docker)
- **Dr. Hoffmann Patient Portal** — Patient portal for dental practice with online appointment booking, treatment history, and recall system. (React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS)

## FAQ

**How long does a project take?**
A professional website: 3–5 weeks. A web app with backend: 2–4 months. Binding timeline with clear milestones after the initial call.

**What does it cost?**
Websites start at €2,500, apps and complex systems from €10,000. Professional code that lasts years.

**What technologies do you use?**
React, Next.js, TypeScript for frontends. React Native for mobile. Node.js and PostgreSQL for backends.

**What happens after launch?**
3 months free support included. Maintenance contracts from €150/month with monitoring, updates, and performance optimization.

**How does the process work?**
Initial call (free) → Fixed-price proposal → Concept & Design → Development with weekly updates → Launch & support.

**How fast do you respond?**
Within 24 hours, usually faster. Critical issues also by phone.
